errors.generic: Something unexpected happened. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Looks like you're offline or our servers can't be reached. Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
errors.notFound: That page or item no longer exists.
errors.resourceGone: This resource is no longer available.
errors.rateLimited: You've hit the limit. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this.
errors.quotaExhausted: You've used all your sessions for today. Come back tomorrow!
errors.sessionNotFound: That session isn't available anymore. Start a new one.
errors.sessionLimitReached: Session limit reached. Start a new session to keep going.
errors.badRequest: That didn't work. Please check your input and try again.
errors.exchangeLimitExceeded: Session limit reached. Start a new session to keep going.
errors.subjectInactive: This subject is on pause right now. You can resume it from your subjects list.
errors.notLanguageLearning: This subject isn't set up for language learning. Try the standard learning path instead.
errors.curriculumNotFound: We haven't set up your learning path yet. Go back and start the interview first.
errors.topicNotFound: That topic isn't available right now. Try picking a different one.
errors.draftNotFound: Your progress was lost. Please start again.
errors.profileNotFound: We had trouble loading your profile. Please sign out and back in.
errors.alreadyCompleted: You've already finished this. Head back and pick something new.
errors.validationFailed: Something didn't look right. Please check what you entered and try again.
errors.timedOut: That reply took too long. Tap reconnect to try again.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or go back to the home screen.
